name: regression-config-migration-defaults
description: Verify config migration adds new defaults, tracks app version, and preserves explicit false values.

steps.command:
tmp=$(mktemp -d); HOME="$tmp" "$PWD/.venv/bin/python" - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import json
from kollabor_config.service import ConfigService
path = Path.home() / '.kollab' / 'config.json'
svc = ConfigService(path, fast_mode=True)
data = json.loads(path.read_text())
print('config_version', data.get('config_version'))
print('last_app_version', data.get('last_app_version'))
print('hub_enabled', data['plugins']['hub']['enabled'])
print('project_scoped', data['plugins']['hub']['project_scoped'])
print('hub_broadcast', data['plugins']['context_service']['hub_broadcast_enabled'])
print('default_agent', data['kollabor']['llm']['default_agent']['name'])
data['plugins']['hub']['enabled'] = False
data['plugins']['hub']['project_scoped'] = False
data['plugins']['context_service']['hub_broadcast_enabled'] = False
path.write_text(json.dumps(data))
svc = ConfigService(path, fast_mode=True)
data = json.loads(path.read_text())
print('explicit_false', data['plugins']['hub']['enabled'], data['plugins']['hub']['project_scoped'], data['plugins']['context_service']['hub_broadcast_enabled'])
PY
rm -rf "$tmp"
